project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo with turbo, Fastify backends, React frontends
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turbo. Workspace packages in packages/*, apps/*, services/*. Build with `pnpm build`, typecheck with `pnpm typecheck`.
test_framework: vitest with coverage-v8. Tests co-located in __tests__/ directories within each app/package. Pattern: describe/it/expect.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install (if deps added), 2. pnpm typecheck, 3. pnpm test, 4. pnpm lint
setup_instructions: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile from repo root. Node >= 22 required.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full npm access. No Docker daemon available for running containers. LiveKit server SDK is a library dependency, not a running server - code must be structured to work against a LiveKit server in production but be testable via mocks/unit tests.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs (<=500 LOC per PR). Document contract first. Every AI feature carries BOM. Cross-app data flow via events. Performance budgets are gates. Gates: install, typecheck, test, build, lint, audit.
key_patterns: Services are classes with constructor DI. Errors via createAppError from @quant/server-core. Fastify plugins for routes. Zod for validation schemas. In-memory Maps for state in services. Package exports via barrel index.ts. Tests use vitest describe/it/expect with beforeEach for service instantiation.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (13 apps), packages/ (39 shared libs), services/ (17 microservices), infra/ (helm, terraform, grafana, scripts). Each app has backend/ with services/, routes/, __tests__/, types. Packages have src/ with barrel index.ts.
